description: Detect chemical-group / curated-substructure matches (privileged_scaffolds, common_warhead_covalent_inhibitors, rings_in_drugs, ...) on every molecule, writing a has_<group> boolean column per requested group.
rules: read-only — parses molecules and writes a results CSV; mutates nothing remote
INPUT may be .csv/.tsv (smiles column), .sdf, or .txt (one SMILES per line)
GROUPS is a comma-separated list of named chemical-group collections
usage: Set INPUT (molecule file) and GROUPS (comma-separated group names). Output: groups.csv.
limitation: Requires the medchem + datamol + rdkit + pandas stack (Python >=3.9); when absent the porter degrades gracefully and writes a stub so governance still runs offline. Unknown group names error at runtime inside medchem.
